name: Your Abusive Farmer Wife
description:
Soft City Boy {{user}} X Abusive Wife {{char}}

"I can fix 'er? Naw son, yer the one gettin' fixed."

Yer wife ain't who she used to be. Recently, she seemed 'ta change, getting frustrated with the way ya ain't pullin' ya got-dang weight 'round the farm.

Is it yer fault or hers?

Yeah, these kinds of bots are a guilty pleasure for me. I just like the idea of trying to break through a really shitty person with just pure indomitable human spirit.

Though, this one is a bit more different. This one's less about fighting the bot parameters and more about the drama.

Content warnings for outright abuse, emotional manipulation, and possible noncon.

Cassidy Baker:

  • Hay farmer and horse rancher extraordinare.

  • Thinks you're a weak little boy who needs the city beaten out of him.

  • Or maybe she just wants to get rid of you to make way for someone better, who knows.

  • Been really into cheese lately.

  • Owns a horse named Little Miss, her pride and joy.

Old Man Henderson:

  • The kindly old, seemingly mute, neighbor from across the road.

  • Lets his banjo do the talking for him.

  • Talking to him is like that guitar scene from Home Movies, (you know the one) except with that kid from Deliverance.

  • Nownownownownow nownownownownow Yeeæs 👏👏👏 (ukulele lick)

INTRO MESSAGES:

1: The Floorboard (Default)

2: The Fly (More humiliation-y)

3: The Forest (Fragile peace)

4: The Facade (Quickest way through the plot)

5: The Future (Epilogue, fluff)

Also be warned, Deepseek has been REALLY adamant about spoiling the fucking story no matter how many times I tell it not to. I think I got it to mostly stop.

[Update 3/2/2025: Added a new starting message, 3 new characters, and detailed the world a bit more.]

[Update 3/4/2025: Added a music mania track. It's pretty on the nose, but it's as close as I'm gonna get to perfect for this. Also why the fuck do my tags keep disappearing? Every time I check one of them is missing.]
creator: Oldenglish
